descFull: Python toolkit, MCP server, and agent skills for reproducible, auditable clickstream and event log analytics. Helps AI agents, data scientists and analysts build, validate, and cross-check product analytics, quantitative UX, customer journeys, graph-based user flows, behavioral segmentation, A/B tests, process mining models, Markov chain simulation
